name: property managers handling 10-20 leases/month tool
description: For property managers processing 10-20 leases/month, missed notifications cause tenant turnover. We automate lease expiration notifications instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Missed lease expiration notifications leading to tenant turnover.
features: dashboard for tracking upcoming lease renewals
manual entry option for lease details
